name: Temecula Acacia Wood Mid-Century Modern End Table - Brown Patina - Christopher Knight Home: Weather-Resistant, Square Shape
description: This Christopher Knight Home Temecula Acacia Wood Mid-Century Modern End Table is a wonderful addition to any sofa or chat set, bringing a minimalistic and sophisticated atmosphere to any backyard or patio space. Made from acacia wood, this end table is both sturdy as well as stylish, designed to complement any decor. Whether you place this end table next to your outdoor sofa or chair set, this Christopher Knight Home Temecula Acacia Wood Mid-Century Modern End Table will blend seamlessly with any existing furniture.
